_comment: DashSnap settings. Copy this file to settings.json and customize.
_browserProfilePath_note: Path to a Chrome/Edge user profile directory. Leave empty to use a fresh session each time. Example: C:\Users\You\AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\User Data\Default
_outputPath_note: Directory where PPTX files are saved. Defaults to ~/Documents/DashSnap if empty.
_defaultTemplate_note: Path to a .pptx template file to use for all flows. Individual flows can override this.
_startUrl_note: URL loaded when DashSnap starts. Set to your most-used dashboard for convenience.
_showTips_note: Show helpful tips and onboarding hints in the UI.
_windowBounds_note: Window size and position. Updated automatically when you resize/move the window. Optional x/y for position.
_sidebarWidth_note: Width of the flow editor sidebar in pixels. Min: 240, Max: 600.
